python3 -c "
import json
with open('knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
for s in data['sections']:
    if s['id'] in ['s20']:
        print(f'=== {s[\"id\"]}: {s[\"title\"]} ===')
        print(s['content'])
        print()
"
